meta.description: TASK-106 · Receives agent run metadata (user_id, workspace_id, tool_key, tokens, status) and writes records to both agent_runs and usage_events tables via Supabase service role.

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "user_id": {{ JSON.stringify($json.user_id) }},
  "workspace_id": {{ $json.workspace_id ? JSON.stringify($json.workspace_id) : 'null' }},
  "tool_key": {{ JSON.stringify($json.tool_key) }},
  "model": {{ JSON.stringify($json.model) }},
  "tokens_in": {{ $json.tokens_in }},
  "tokens_out": {{ $json.tokens_out }},
  "status": {{ JSON.stringify($json.status) }},
  "duration_ms": {{ $json.duration_ms }},
  "session_id": {{ $json.session_id ? JSON.stringify($json.session_id) : 'null' }}
}
